layout.name: regularJumpNoBlockCollision
layout.title: Don't bonk ceilings
layout.tooltip: If set to true, regular jumps will pass through blocks and always land at the same Y coordinate as they started.

layout.name: ledgeSeekRange
layout.title: Ledge Radius
layout.tooltip: How far up/down this bro is willing to jump to find another ledge.

layout.name: ledgeJumpChance
layout.title: Ledge Jump Chance
layout.tooltip: Does not take effect if the Ledge Radius is 0. % of jumps that are ledge jumps instead of normal jumps.
